title: Wanderlust Beacons
description: Ancient obelisks appear in chunks you've never visited, emitting particles that guide explorers toward undiscovered territories.
body:
# Wanderlust Beacons

A datapack that spawns mysterious stone obelisks at the boundaries between explored and unexplored terrain.

## Spawning Mechanics

When a player enters a chunk adjacent to unvisited areas, there is a chance an obelisk will rise from the ground in a nearby unexplored chunk. The obelisk spawn is marked by rising amber particles visible from considerable distance.

## Structure Design

Obelisks are composed of deepslate and copper blocks in a simple spiral formation, topped with a lightning rod that occasionally sparks. They serve as natural waypoints for navigation.

## Decay System

Each obelisk tracks how long players spend in its chunk vicinity. Once a player has lingered within a 3-chunk radius for a cumulative five minutes of real time, the obelisk begins deteriorating block by block until nothing remains.

## Generation Limits

The generation logic prevents obelisk spam by:
- Maintaining minimum distances between active beacons
- Limiting total active obelisks per dimension

## Compass Fragment System

When an obelisk fully crumbles, it drops a unique compass fragment. Collecting four fragments at a crafting table yields a Cartographer's Lodestone that points toward the nearest active obelisk, creating a perpetual exploration loop for players who continuously push into uncharted wilderness.
